questions.question: Why does `v-show` not work on `<template>` elements?
options: `<template>` is a reserved tag and ignores all directives
`v-show` requires an element with a `display` property, but `<template>` has no DOM node
`<template>` uses shadow DOM which blocks CSS
`v-show` is not yet implemented for multi-element wrappers

questions.question: What is the correct alternative to `<template v-show>` when toggling multiple elements?
options: Use `<div v-show>` as a wrapper, or use `<template v-if>`
Use `v-show` on each individual child element

questions.question: How do you achieve 'else' behavior when using `v-show` (since `v-else` is unsupported)?
options: Use `v-if` for the else branch only
Use two elements with negated conditions: `v-show="x"` and `v-show="!x"`
